_comment: Approximate 5-hour / 7-day / overage limits per Anthropic plan. Values are publicly discussed estimates; adjust as Anthropic refines their plan caps. 'extra' = the overage bucket activated once weekly usage exceeds the base limit.

_schema.fiveH: USD basis for the 5h block (100% at this value)
_schema.weekly: USD basis for the 7d rolling window (100% at this value)
_schema.extra: USD basis for the +extra overage segment
